title: Black And White
sourceTitle: Black And White Reference Identity Studio Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image premium black-and-white studio portrait for a user-owned portrait reference for facial identity and overall appearance, preserving the same adult male subject from the uploaded photo. Subject: the same adult male subject from the uploaded photo is seated slightly forward in a confident relaxed seated pose with elbows on knees and hands loosely clasped, wearing a fitted black ribbed knit sweater with small diamond stud earrings with direct eye contact and calm intense expression. Scene: Seamless light-gray studio backdrop with subtle gradient, clean distraction-free space, and high-end fashion campaign restraint. Composition: Preserve the uploaded reference identity and overall appearance while using a fixed 4:5 seated editorial crop, elbows on knees, hands loosely clasped, eye-level framing, and strong depth toward the camera. Style: Premium monochrome fashion-editorial portrait, ultra-realistic facial detail, luxury magazine retouching, timeless black-and-white tones, and sharp eye focus. Color Palette: Fixed black, white, charcoal, and soft gray tonal range with natural skin texture rendered in monochrome. Lighting: Soft studio light from front and slight side angle, gentle shadows, realistic facial definition, and controlled contrast. Camera: Eye-level 85mm portrait lens with premium fashion-editorial perspective and shallow cinematic depth. Reference Image Policy: Use a user-owned or consented face reference only for facial identity and overall appearance; rebuild wardrobe, pose, lighting, and studio setting from the schema. Source Image Recipe: One clear frontal or three-quarter portrait reference with visible facial features is required before local image-to-image generation. Restrictions: Keep identity consistent with the reference, hands natural, posture believable, backdrop clean, and the image watermark-free.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
